sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_encryption (id UInt32, cipher BINARY(32));
INSERT INTO test_encryption (id, cipher) VALUES (1, aes_encrypt_mysql('aes-256-cbc', 'Hello World', '12345678901234567890123456789012', '1234567890123456'));
UPDATE test_encryption SET cipher = aes_encrypt_mysql('aes-128-ecb', 'New Secret', '1234567890123456') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT hex(cipher) AS encrypted_value FROM test_encryption WHERE id = 1;
